form.label: Settings
form.description: Bootstrap defaults applied to NEW entities at discovery time, app health checks, and the audit log of inline edits. Existing entities keep their per-row thresholds until you edit them.

div.p: Discovery + status defaults are now stored as Splunk search macros, not KV-store settings. Splunk 10.4's parser rejects the subsearch-in-eval pattern this dashboard used to rely on. Edit the values directly via:
Settings › Advanced search › Search macros — filter for carbide_default_.

ul.li: carbide_default_monitored — 0 (off) or 1 (on) for newly discovered entities
carbide_default_offhours_grace — seconds of grace after a schedule reopens before a stale gap fires; default 3600 (1h). Overridden per entity.

search.query: | inputlookup carbide_tracked_hosts_lookup | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_tracked_hosts collection reachable" | append [ | inputlookup carbide_tracked_sources_lookup | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_tracked_sources collection reachable" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_entity_filters_lookup | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_entity_filters collection reachable (seeded if > 0)" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_entity_filters_seed | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_entity_filters_seed CSV present" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_holidays_lookup | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_holidays collection reachable" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_assets_lookup | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_assets collection reachable" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_autowatch_lookup | stats count as rows | eval check="carbide_autowatch_rules collection reachable" ] | append [ | tstats count as rows where index=`carbide_index` earliest=-7d@d | eval check="dedicated index `carbide_index` reachable + recent snapshots" ] | append [ | tstats count as rows where `carbide_entity_filter("hosts")` earliest=-1h@h | eval check="carbide_entity_filter(\"hosts\") macro returns a valid clause" ] | eval status = case( check="carbide_entity_filters collection reachable (seeded if > 0)" AND rows>0, "ok", check="carbide_entity_filters collection reachable (seeded if > 0)", "warn (empty)", check="carbide_entity_filters_seed CSV present" AND rows>0, "ok", check="carbide_entity_filters_seed CSV present", "fail", check="dedicated index `carbide_index` reachable + recent snapshots" AND rows>0, "ok", check="dedicated index `carbide_index` reachable + recent snapshots", "warn (no events in 7d)", isnotnull(rows), "ok", 1=1, "fail" ) | table check, status, rows

| rest /servicesNS/-/carbide_app_for_splunk/saved/searches splunk_server=local | search title="Carbide -*" | eval next_run = if(isnull(next_scheduled_time) OR next_scheduled_time="", "n/a", next_scheduled_time) | table title cron_schedule disabled is_scheduled next_run | rename title as "saved search"

| makeresults | append [ | inputlookup carbide_tracked_hosts_lookup | stats count as rows | eval collection="carbide_tracked_hosts" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_tracked_sources_lookup | stats count as rows | eval collection="carbide_tracked_sources" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_entity_filters_lookup | stats count as rows | eval collection="carbide_entity_filters" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_assets_lookup | stats count as rows | eval collection="carbide_assets" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_holidays_lookup | stats count as rows | eval collection="carbide_holidays" ] | append [ | inputlookup carbide_autowatch_lookup | stats count as rows | eval collection="carbide_autowatch_rules" ] | where isnotnull(collection) | table collection rows

panel.title: Audit trail (every KV write under this app)

html.p: Sourced from Splunk's built-in access logs (index=_internal, splunkd_access + splunkd_ui_access) — every KV write to the Carbide collections is recorded automatically with the caller and URI. Writes from the app's Manage pages go through the UI server, so both access sourcetypes are included. No app-side audit code required.

search.query: index=_internal (sourcetype=splunkd_access OR sourcetype=splunkd_ui_access) "storage/collections/data" (method=POST OR method=DELETE) | eval uri_path = coalesce(uri_path, uri, _raw) | where match(uri_path, "/storage/collections/data/carbide_") | rex field=uri_path "/storage/collections/data/(?<collection>carbide_[^/?]+)(?:/(?<seg>[^/?]+))?" | eval action = case( method="DELETE" AND isnull(seg), "bulk_delete (by query)", method="DELETE", "delete", seg="batch_save", "bulk_save", method="POST" AND isnull(seg), "create", method="POST", "update", 1=1, method) | eval kv_key = if(isnull(seg) OR seg="batch_save", "-", seg) | sort - _time | head 200 | table _time, user, action, collection, kv_key, status, uri_path | rename kv_key as "_key", uri_path as "URI"
